subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of supreme guidance! Blessed art thou, for thou hast turned from the north wind of self and desire unto the right hand of spirit and guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدایت کبری خوشا حال تو که از شمال نفس و هوی بیمین روح و هدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
